title: Meadow's Smooth Granite
description: Refreshes the textures of granite, diorite, and andesite while staying faithful to vanilla
body:
This lightweight resource pack **overhauls the often-disliked stone types Granite, Diorite, and Andesite** to make them actually useful for your builds while staying **faithful to vanilla**.




This pack is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0. You are free to use and share it as long as you credit me and do not use it commercially.
